intro: Shape the climb. Ride the waves. Reach the sky.
description:
Sky Reach is a minimalistic, neon-drenched infinite climber set in a cyberpunk city that stretches from the darkest slums to the open sky above.

You play as a small rectangular hero with one goal: climb higher than ever before. Jump from platform to platform, react fast, and keep moving upward as the city pulses beneath you.

But Sky Reach isn’t just about precision jumping.

Shape Your Own Path

The core mechanic lets you shoot energy waves. The world itself is alive with waves of motion - and when the waves collide, they create new platforms.
Every shot matters. Every collision can change your route. You’re not just climbing the tower - you’re building it as you go.

Climb Together

Play solo or team up in local co-op for two players. Help each other recover from falls, create platforms together, and push your climb further than you ever could alone. Cooperation can mean the difference between a new high score… or a long fall down.

Grow Stronger the Higher You Go

Reach climbing milestones to unlock new power-ups that let you jump higher, move faster, and bend the rules of ascent. Master them, chain your progress, and chase ever-greater heights - and scores.

A Neon City With a Soul

Ascend through five distinct neon backdrops, each revealing a new layer of the city - from gritty street-level slums to the glowing skyline and beyond. Beneath the action lies a simple, touching narrative, quietly unfolding as you rise.
